scripts.lint: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const files=['app/page.tsx','app/episodes/[episodeId]/character-review/page.tsx','app/episodes/[episodeId]/segments/page.tsx'];for(const f of files){if(!fs.existsSync(f)){console.error('Missing file:',f);process.exit(1)}};console.log('web lint ok');"
scripts.test:e2e: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const checks=[['app/page.tsx','AI 配音导演台'],['app/episodes/[episodeId]/character-review/page.tsx','角色分析确认'],['app/episodes/[episodeId]/segments/page.tsx','关键片段精修']];for(const [f,t] of checks){if(!fs.existsSync(f)){console.error('Missing file:',f);process.exit(1)};if(!fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').includes(t)){console.error('Missing text:',t);process.exit(1)}};console.log('web smoke ok')"
